Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Paris Bealey (Petitioner). Beverly Beasley Green in Pro Per.

Mr. Vann reported that he received the Trust this morning and the property is in the trust and that this petition is not necessary. The Court took the Petiton off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
